<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore
- [ ] ⚡ Performance

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For any UI change, add before/after screenshots or a short GIF. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (0 errors / 0 warnings)
- [ ] `cargo check` passes in `src-tauri/`
- [ ] (If Rust changed) `cargo fmt` and `cargo clippy` run
- [ ] Builds/behaves cross-platform, or platform-specific paths are `#[cfg]`-gated and noted
- [ ] Docs updated (`README` / `docs/`) where relevant
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-facing changes
- [ ] I read the [Contributing guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything you couldn't test (e.g. another OS), trade-offs, follow-ups. -->
